title: Required + optional field distinction
prompt: MyApp.Accounts.Contact has email, name, phone fields. Email and name are required; phone is optional. Write the changeset — cast all three, but only validate_required email and name. Write to lib/my_app/accounts/contact.ex.
tier_rationale: Single changeset with a specific require list. Easy but catches Claude copy-paste of the cast list into validate_required.
